questionHtml:
The actual volume of the asteroid is found to be 6.074×106 km3.

Find the percentage error in James’s estimate of the volume.
markschemeHtml:
6 043 992.82-6.074×1066.074×106×100       (M1)


Note: Award (M1) for their correct substitution into the percentage error formula (accept a consistent absence of “×106” from all terms).


0.494 %  0.494026…%       (A1)(ft)  (C2) 


Note: Follow through from their answer to part (b). If the final answer is negative, award at most (M1)(A0).


[2 marks]

meta.title: The actual volume of the asteroid is found to be 6.074×106 km3. Find the percentage error in James’s estimate of the volume.
